subcodes.first_line: The purpose of this servant hath ever been, throughout all days and nights, that the beloved of God should manifest truthfulness and fairness and draw nigh unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لازال مقصود این عبد از احباء الله صدق و انصاف و تقرب الی الله بوده در کل ایام و لیالی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom
